nasb.text: And behold, I am sending forth the promise of My Father upon you; but you are to stay in the city until you are clothed with power from on high.”

esv.text: And behold, I am sending the promise of my Father upon you. But stay in the city until you are clothed with power from on high.”

cnv.text: 我要使我父的應許臨到你們身上，你們當在城裡等候，直到得著從上面來的能力。”

ccb.text: 我要把我父所应许的赐给你们。不过，你们要留在城里，直到你们得到天上来的能力。”

csbs.text: 看哪！我要将我父所应许的差派到你们那里。不过你们要留在城里，直到领受了从上面来的能力。”
